title: SwagerSMP
body:
# What kinda modpack is this?
Are you Looking for a modpack that doesnt change allot of the vanilla gameplay? This might be the modpack for you! The SwagerSMP modpack aims to change as little of the vanilla gameplay while still feeling fresh by adding new blocks, foods and small quality of life improvements for the best experience

# Shaders/TexturePacks included
- [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-shaders-v4) - EminGT
- [Faithfull](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) - Faithful Community

# mods included
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - CaffeineMC
- [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn) - Juuxel
- [bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Johni0702
- [DyanmicFPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Juliand665
- [Eating Animation](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eating-animation-fabric) - Theone_ss
- [Edit Sign](https://modrinth.com/mod/editsign) - RakSrinaNa
- [Quilt Kotlin Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/qkl) - Quilt Team
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Fourmisain
- [Ferritecore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Malte0811

- [Inspecio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inspecio) - LambdAurora

- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - Astei
- [Lambdynamiclights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - LambdAurora
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Astei
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - CaffeineMC
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Prospector
- [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer) - Ennui
- [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor) - CaffeineMC
- [Quilt Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) - Quilt Team
- [Tax Free Levels](https://modrinth.com/mod/tax-free-levels) - Fourmisain
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) - Emi
- [The Veggie Way](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/veggieway-fabric) - kwpugh
